name: 公开链抓取 -> 结构化解析与关键对象抽取
consumer_obligations: Stage3 must consume Stage2 producer objects public_chain, clock_chain_profile, notice_version_chain, and fixation_bundle as read-only formal inputs.

Stage3 must consume source_registry_id, route_policy_id, route_decision_state, route_review_reasons, winning_version_resolution_rule_id, version_conflict_state, clock_conflict_state, collection_state, and clock_resolution_rule_id from Stage2 formal outputs / handoff rather than recomputing them from scattered payload override.
Missing or conflicting fixation, version, clock, or route authority must route Stage3 truth-layer output into REVIEW or BLOCK before Stage4 consumption.
stage3_truth_layer_output_obligations: Stage3 must produce project_base as the formal project truth root.
Stage3 must produce field_lineage_record for key parsed fields with source slice, parser confidence, normalization rule, lineage_status, and conflict_state.
Stage3 must produce bidder_candidate as candidate-collection members rather than a single implied candidate truth.
Stage3 must carry unresolved or conflicting lineage into review/block paths before Stage4 verification consumption.

unresolved_or_conflicting_lineage_paths.condition: missing source slice, missing normalization rule, or unverified field lineage
multi-version, clock, or field conflict is unresolved
